46:1:1.m: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)

46:2:5.m: The Mighty One (a name/attribute of Allah)

46:2:6.m: The All-Wise (one of Allah's names, following العَزِيزِ)

46:3:4.m: and the earth (object of خَلَقْنَا/we created)

46:3:6.m: between them two (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ)

46:3:15.m: those who turn away (subject of كَفَرُوا)

46:4:4.m: you (all) call upon (the false deities besides اللَّهِ)

46:4:7.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to what comes after)

46:4:9.m: what (asking about something in the ayah)

46:4:24.m: a trace/piece of evidence (of عِلْمٍ knowledge)

46:5:2.m: more/most lost from the right way

46:5:18.m: those who are heedless (plural, in nominative case)

46:6:1.m: and when (connects to حُشِرَ - were gathered)

46:7:1.m: And when (connecting this condition to what came before)

إِذَا: when (connecting this condition to what came before)

46:7:2.m: it (our verses) is being recited (to them)

46:7:13.m: magic (something the disbelievers said about قَالَ the truth)

46:8:3.m: he made it up (object of يَقُولُونَ)

46:8:9.m: for me (connected to تَمْلِكُونَ - you possess)

46:8:12.m: a thing (that is affected by تَمْلِكُونَ - you possess)

46:8:18.m: he was sufficient (subject of قُلْ - say)

46:8:20.m: as a witness (object of كَفَىٰ - sufficient)

46:8:24.m: The Most Forgiving (One of Allah's names)

46:9:10.m: it is being done (passive of يَفْعَلُ)

46:9:16.m: except/only (excluding what follows from what was mentioned before)

إِلَّا: except/only (excluding what follows from what was mentioned before)

46:9:17.m: what (asking about what will be done with me)

46:10:8.m: and you all rejected/denied (connected to أَرَءَيْتُمْ - 'have you seen')

46:10:16.m: similar to it, like it (after عَلَىٰ)

46:10:20.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)

46:10:22.m: he guides (the subject is اللَّهَ - Allah)

46:10:23.m: the people (object of لَا يَهْدِى - does not guide)

َ: (object of لَا يَهْدِى - does not guide)

46:11:6.m: if (hypothetical, introducing a condition that did not happen)

لَوْ: if (hypothetical, introducing a condition that did not happen)

46:11:7.m: it was (describing something in لَوْ if/had condition)

46:11:8.m: any good thing (object of كَانَ - was)

46:11:11.m: to him/it (referring to what they disbelieved in)

هِ: him/it (referring to what they disbelieved in)

46:12:4.m: Moses (in this ayah, referring to the Book of Moses)

46:12:7.m: and this (referring to the Quran, connecting it to كِتٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ)

هٰذَا: this (referring to the Quran, connecting it to كِتٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ)

46:12:9.m: one who confirms (describes كِتٰبٌ - a book)

46:12:10.m: a language (being confirmed as Arabic in this ayah)

46:12:15.m: and good news (for الْمُحْسِنِينَ - those who do good)

46:12:16.m: for the (specific) ones who do good deeds

46:13:4.m: Our Lord (subject of قَالُوا - they said)

46:13:8.m: so not (there will not be fear)

46:14:1.m: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)

46:14:4.m: those who remain forever (describing the people of Paradise)

46:14:6.m: as a reward (for what they used to do)

46:14:7.m: because of what (they did in يَعْمَلُونَ)

46:14:9.m: they do/are doing work (referring to those who will be in Paradise forever)

46:15:2.m: the human being (object of وَصَّيْنَا - we advised)

46:15:7.m: with difficulty (describes وَضَعَتْهُ - she delivered him)

46:15:11.m: and his weaning (subject with حَمْلُهُ of ثَلٰثُونَ شَهْرًا)

46:15:13.m: a month (being counted as part of ثَلٰثُونَ thirty)

46:15:16.m: he reached (subject of وَبَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً - and he reached forty years)

46:15:20.m: a year (object of بَلَغَ أَرْبَعِينَ - he reached forty)

46:15:22.m: O my Lord! (calling upon the Lord)

46:15:26.m: Your blessing (object of أَشْكُرَ - to thank)

46:15:27.m: the one which (feminine, referring to نِعْمَتَكَ - Your favor)

تِىٓ: one which (feminine, referring to نِعْمَتَكَ - Your favor)

46:15:35.m: you are pleased with him (object of أَعْمَلَ)

46:15:36.m: and make good! (as a command to Allah)

46:15:43.m: and indeed I (the one who تُبْتُ/repented)

46:15:45.m: the Muslims (those who submit to Allah)

46:16:2.m: those who (plural) (subject of نَتَقَبَّلُ - we accept)

46:16:4.m: from them/away from them (object of نَتَقَبَّلُ)

46:16:5.m: best (of ما عَمِلُوا۟ - what they did)

46:16:8.m: and we overlook/forgive (the mistakes of أَصْحٰبِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ)

46:16:10.m: their bad deeds (object of نَتَجَاوَزُ/we pass over)

46:16:11.m: in (connecting أَصْحٰبِ to what comes before)

46:17:4.m: ugh!/fie! (expression of disgust towards لِوٰلِدَيْهِ - his parents)

46:17:7.m: that (connects to أُخْرَجَ - I will be brought out)

46:17:16.m: Allah (as the object being called upon)

46:17:25.m: this (referring to what was just mentioned)

هٰذَآ: this (referring to what was just mentioned)

46:17:26.m: except (in response to مَا هٰذَآ - 'what is this')

46:17:28.m: the first/ancient ones (object of إِلَّا أَسَاطِيرُ)

46:18:1.m: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of حَقَّ)

46:18:5.m: the saying, the statement (as the doer of حَقَّ - became true)

ُ: (as the doer of حَقَّ - became true)

46:18:6.m: in (connects أُمَمٍ with what comes before)

46:18:7.m: nations, communities, peoples (acted upon by خَلَتْ)

46:18:11.m: before them (referring to nations mentioned in أُمَمٍ)

46:18:13.m: the jinn (part of مِّنَ meaning 'from/of the')

46:18:16.m: they were (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ)

46:19:1.m: and for each (connecting to previous statement)

46:19:2.m: ranks/levels (referring to the different levels people will have based on what they did)

ٰ: (referring to the different levels people will have based on what they did)

46:19:5.m: and so that he pays them in full

46:19:6.m: their works/deeds (referring to the deeds of those mentioned in وَلِكُلٍّ)

46:20:3.m: those who (refers to كَفَرُوا۟ - they disbelieved)

46:20:8.m: your (plural) good things (object of أَذْهَبْتُمْ - you exhausted)

46:20:10.m: your (plural) life (object of أَذْهَبْتُمْ - you exhausted)

46:20:12.m: and you all sought to enjoy

46:20:13.m: with/in/by it/her (referring to طَيِّبٰتِكُمْ - your good things)

46:20:14.m: so today (as object of تُجْزَوْنَ - you are recompensed)

46:20:15.m: you (all) are given what is due (for your arrogance)

46:20:16.m: punishment (object of تُجْزَوْنَ - you are recompensed)

46:20:17.m: the disgrace (punishment in عَذَابَ ٱلْهُونِ - punishment of disgrace)

46:20:21.m: in (connects حَيَاتِكُمُ with what comes before it)

46:20:25.m: and because of what (connects to تُجْزَوْنَ)

46:20:27.m: you all break away (from right conduct)

46:21:7.m: in the sand dunes (where the people of 'Ad lived)

46:21:10.m: the warners (subject of خَلَتِ - passed away)

46:21:12.m: between (of يَدَيْهِ - his hands/in front of him)

46:21:16.m: that not (introducing what not to do)

46:21:19.m: Allah (as the object being worshipped in تَعْبُدُوٓا۟)

َ: (as the object being worshipped in تَعْبُدُوٓا۟)

46:22:3.m: in order to turn us away

46:23:6.m: and I deliver to you all intensively

46:23:7.m: what (with emphasis) (object of أُرْسِلْتُ - I was sent)

46:23:9.m: with it/by it (referring to what was sent in أُرْسِلْتُ)

46:23:11.m: I see you all (as a people)

46:23:12.m: a people (object of أَرَىٰ - I see)

46:24:3.m: a showing up thing (object of رَأَوْهُ/they saw it)

46:24:6.m: they said (the people when they saw the cloud)

46:24:8.m: a thing showing up (describes the cloud in مُّسْتَقْبِلَ)

46:24:9.m: the one who will send rain upon us (predicate of عَارِضٌ)

46:24:17.m: a punishment (describes رِيحٌ/wind in this ayah)

46:25:3.m: any thing (acted on by تُدَمِّرُ - it destroys)

46:25:11.m: like that (connects to نَجْزِى - we recompense)

46:26:3.m: in what/whatever (connected to مَكَّنَّاهُمْ - We established them)

46:26:9.m: hearing (as something given by جَعَلْنَا - we made/gave)

ًا: (as something given by جَعَلْنَا - we made/gave)

46:26:14.m: from them/away from them (connected to أَغْنَىٰ - availed)

46:26:18.m: and not (connects to previous negation of سَمْعُهُمْ - their hearing)

46:26:23.m: they were (subject of يَجْحَدُونَ - they denied)

46:26:24.m: they deny/are denying (the signs of Allah)

46:26:26.m: of Allah (possessed by/connected to يَجْحَدُونَ بِـَٔايٰتِ)

46:26:28.m: with them (referring to their hearing, sight, and hearts mentioned earlier)

46:26:31.m: with him/it (referring to what they used to mock)

46:27:8.m: the signs (object of صَرَّفْنَا - we have explained)

46:28:1.m: Then why not / so why didn't

46:29:3.m: towards you (receiving the turning/directing in وَلَّوْا۟)

46:29:4.m: a group (object of صَرَفْنَآ - we directed)

46:29:6.m: of the jinn (group listening to ٱلْقُرْءَانَ)

46:29:8.m: the Quran (object being listened to by الْجِنِّ)

46:29:12.m: be silent and listen! (command to a group)

46:30:2.m: O our people! (calling out to them)

46:30:5.m: a book (object of سَمِعْنَا - we heard)

46:30:9.m: Moses - a proper name borrowed from Hebrew/Ancient Egyptian

46:30:13.m: his two hands/forearms (that which is between)

46:31:6.m: with/in/by him/it (referring to دَاعِىَ ٱللَّهِ - the caller of Allah)

46:31:7.m: he forgives/will forgive (the subject of this verb is Allah, as shown by the context)

46:31:10.m: your sins (object of يَغْفِرْ - He will forgive)

46:31:11.m: and He will protect you all (if you believe)

46:32:5.m: of the deity, of the god

46:33:1.m: And have they not (connected to يَرَوْا۟)

46:33:11.m: by their creation (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ - the heavens and earth)

46:33:15.m: he gives life (acted on by قادر)

46:33:16.m: the dead (object of يُحْۦِىَ - gives life to)

46:34:3.m: those who (referring to كَفَرُوا۟ - those who disbelieved)

46:34:8.m: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

هٰذَا: this (pointing to something in the ayah)

46:35:1.m: so be patient! (connected to كَمَا صَبَرَ that follows)

46:35:3.m: he was patient (like the messengers mentioned after)

46:35:9.m: you seek to rush (negative command with لَا)
